# Fire Shield
> A property-specific wildfire decision assistant for Southern Oregon (Rogue Valley).
> Enter a property address to get a zone-based action plan, fire-resistant plant recommendations,
> jurisdiction-aware local rules and grants, and inspection-ready guidance — all with cited sources.

## App
- [Home](https://fire-shield.vercel.app/): Address entry and quick start
- [Property Overview](https://fire-shield.vercel.app/property): Zone-based action plan for your address
- [Map View](https://fire-shield.vercel.app/map): Home Ignition Zone rings with clickable zone cards
- [Plant Search](https://fire-shield.vercel.app/plants): Fire-resistant plant database with zone placement
- [Chat](https://fire-shield.vercel.app/chat): Ask questions, get cited answers scoped to your jurisdiction

## Plant Database
- [All Plants](/api/plants/llms.txt): Complete plant database with fire-science traits and zone suitability
- [Plant Search API](/api/plants/search): Filterable plant search (zone, water, native, deer resistant, sun)

## Zone Actions
- [Zone Action Framework](/zones/llms.txt): Home Ignition Zone model with evidence-based actions
- [Zone Actions API](/api/zones): All 17 prioritized actions organized by HIZ layer

## Knowledge Base
- [Fire Science Evidence](/knowledge/fire-science/llms.txt): Key research findings (IBHS, Camp Fire, Marshall Fire, Almeda)
- [Local Code and Ordinances](/knowledge/local-code/llms.txt): Jurisdiction-specific requirements (Ashland, Jacksonville, Jackson County, Oregon)
- [Grants and Incentives](/knowledge/grants/llms.txt): Financial assistance programs (Oregon SB 762, USFS, FEMA)

## MCP Tools (for AI agents)
- [MCP Server](/mcp/llms.txt): How to connect AI agents via Model Context Protocol
- Tool: search_plants — search the plant database by zone, water needs, native status, deer resistance
- Tool: get_zone_actions — get prioritized HIZ actions for an address with jurisdiction-scoped rules

## Agent Web Layer
- [Full Content Dump](/api/llms-full): Complete plant database + zone actions + key evidence as Markdown
  (Content-Type: text/markdown; use Accept: text/markdown header on any content page)

## About
- [How Fire Shield Works](/about/llms.txt): Architecture, data sources, citation methodology
- Coverage: Ashland, Jacksonville, Medford, Talent, Phoenix, Central Point, Eagle Point, Jackson County, Josephine County, Oregon State
- Evidence base: IBHS, NFPA, CAL FIRE, Camp Fire studies, Marshall Fire, Almeda Fire, Nature Communications 2025
- Last updated: 2026-03-28
